title: Database Access on MySQL
text: Database Access on MySQL The MQL connector uses the MySQL client library to connect to the server and manipulate the DBMS. Logon Information In the assignment file, specify the connector and database path: [DRIVER_SETTINGS]MQL = Version ; for example MQL=U5.0 [PATHS]$MQL MQL: HostId {+ Port }:{ Database }|{ UserName }|{ Password } Copy The default port is 3306. If you want to use a different port, explicitly specify Port . Close and Open Support The open and close instructions are fully supported. The open instruction opens the relevant path and attempts to log on to the database. The close instruction closes all tables and logs off from MySQL, shutting down that path. Using MySQL for the Repository MySQL Server can be used for the Uniface Repository. For more information, see Generate Scripts for Creating Database Tables . Related Links Database Access Uniface automatically opens the DBMS when a read or write ProcScript statement is issued. The path and logon details for the specific database (or databases) can be provided in an assignment file, a command line instruction, or in the open ProcScript instruction. Paths and Path Assignments A path is a named route to a resource required by the application, such as a database connector and database, a remote server, or a file location. Was this topic helpful?
